narration: Import the argparse module into the script.
Define the main entry point using the if __name__ == '__main__' statement.
Set the parser's description to the welcome message text.
Add a positional argument named 'size' with type string.
Specify the valid choices for the 'size' argument using the sizes constant keys.
Add custom help text for the 'size' argument.
Call parser.parse_args() to parse command-line arguments.
Store the parsed arguments in a variable named 'parsed_args'.
Run the program to verify the argument parsing works correctly.

Import the argparse module into the script.
Define the main entry point using the if __name__ == '__main__' statement.
Instantiate an ArgumentParser object with a description.
Set the parser's description to the welcome message text.
Add a positional argument named 'size' with type string.
Specify the valid choices for the 'size' argument using the sizes constant keys.
Add custom help text for the 'size' argument.
Call parser.parse_args() to parse command-line arguments.
Store the parsed arguments in a variable named 'parsed_args'.
Run the program to verify the argument parsing works correctly.
Add a second positional argument named 'crust' with type string.
Specify the valid choices for the 'crust' argument using the crusts constant keys.
Add a custom help text for the 'crust' argument.
Add an optional argument named 'extra_cheese' with type flag.
Set the action for the 'extra_cheese' argument to store true.
Set the destination variable for 'extra_cheese' to 'cheese'.
Add an optional argument named 'extra_sauce' with type flag.
Set the action for the 'extra_sauce' argument to store true.
Set the destination variable for 'extra_sauce' to 'sauce'.
Add an optional argument named 'toppings' with type string.
Set the number of arguments for 'toppings' to accept one or more values.
Add custom help text for the 'toppings' argument.
Update the build_pizza helper function to accept a namespace object instead of a dictionary.
Access the size attribute from the namespace object in the build_pizza function.
Access the crust attribute from the namespace object in the build_pizza function.

Store the output of the build_pizza function in the main script.
Print the final pizza result to the console.
Test the program with invalid values for size to demonstrate validation.
Test the program with invalid values for crust to demonstrate validation.
Remove the debug print statement to clean up the final output.
